title: Court can't pass order to enforce CM's press conference promises: Delhi High Court overturns verdict on Arvind Kejriwal
description: The Delhi High Court on Monday overturned a single-judge ruled which had held that a promise, assurance or representation given by the Chief Minister (CM) of a State in a press conference amounts to an enforceable promise that has to be implemented by the government [Govt of NCT of Delhi v. Najma]. A single-judge Bench had earlier ordered the Delhi government, then led by the Aam Aadmi Party's Arvind Kejriwal to take steps to frame a policy to carry out an assurance given by the CM. This ruling
